author: Vaillant Samuel
subject: v4.4.1
body: ## [4.4.1](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v4.4.0...v4.4.1) (2018-01-09) ### Bug Fixes * **SearchBox**: clear SearchBox without search as you type ([algolia/react-instantsearch#802](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/802)) ([4725705](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/4725705)) * **connectRange:** check if facet exist before access ([algolia/react-instantsearch#797](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/797)) ([34c2e2f](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/34c2e2f)) * **stories:** avoid to use linear-background it breaks Argos every time ([algolia/react-instantsearch#804](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/804)) ([0643089](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/0643089)) * **stories:** limit hits per page on Index ([algolia/react-instantsearch#806](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/806)) ([0bfa1fd](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/0bfa1fd)) ### Features * **Index:** allow custom root ([algolia/react-instantsearch#792](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/792)) ([bb02c55](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/bb02c55))
